quote.text: If I can stop one heart from breaking, I shall not live in vain.
quote.author: Emily Dickinson

history.text: If I can stop one heart from breaking, I shall not live in vain.
history.author: Emily Dickinson

history.text: You'll get more from being a peacemaker than a warrior.
history.author: Arnold Schwarzenegger

history.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
history.author: Steve Jobs
